parameters.query: INSERT INTO ai_decisions (correlation_id, agent_role, decision_type, input_summary, context_used, evidence, decision, recommendation, confidence, risk_level, requires_human_approval, status) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5::jsonb, $6::jsonb, $7::jsonb, $8, $9, $10, $11, $12);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $json.correlation_id || null, 'PM Monitor', 'diagnostico_semanal', ('Severidad: ' + ($node['Preparar Prompt'].json.analysis?.severidad_max || 'baja') + ' | Problemas: ' + ($node['Preparar Prompt'].json.analysis?.cantidad_problemas || 0)).slice(0, 500), JSON.stringify($node['Preparar Prompt'].json.analysis || {}), JSON.stringify({ kpis: $node['Preparar Prompt'].json.analysis?.kpis || {} }), JSON.stringify({ diagnostico: $json.ia_text || '' }), null, null, ($node['Preparar Prompt'].json.analysis?.severidad_max || null), false, 'logged' ] }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO workflow_runs_audit (workflow_id, workflow_name, status, completed_at, correlation_id, metrics) VALUES ($1, $2, 'success', NOW(), $3, $4::jsonb);
